home.heroTitle:
Before you spend your first dollar,

first sharpen your judgment.
home.heroSubtitle: ZhiQing PreFounder pairs multi-agent workflows with verifiable data sources for people who are seriously considering a startup but haven't incorporated yet — run track comparison, business-model canvas, competitive landscape, and regulatory / scenario stress tests before you commit capital and time.
home.metricsTitle: More than a nice story — every number comes from <gold>reproducible Python models</gold>.
home.metricsSubtitle: SEED 20260501 · 9 independent models · 12,000–30,000 Monte Carlo paths · reconciled against Business Plan v3.0 source data.
home.m4Caption: Smart ranking vs random baseline · Model 04
home.m5Caption: Subscription + cash + median equity exit · Model 02+07
home.pillar1Desc: From track radar to business-model canvas — a consistent assumption-evidence-conclusion chain. Every judgment is traceable, auditable, and reviewable.
home.pillar2Desc: Agents divide the work: industry research, competitor financial proxies, policy scanning, interview guides and due-diligence checklists — retrieving in parallel and cross-falsifying each other.
home.pillar3Desc: Scenarios and sensitivity: how price, acquisition cost, and regulatory events hit your model — 12,000+ Monte Carlo paths reconstruct the uncertainty.
home.linesTitle: Three product lines for three <gold>depths of decision</gold>.
home.lineDeepDesc: Tailored for core teams already set on founding: full due diligence, a legally structured equity-swap arrangement, and platform compensation deeply aligned with the project's long-term valuation.
home.lineStarterTitle: Track comparison · BM Canvas · policy timeline
home.lineStarterDesc: A low-barrier SaaS subscription for individuals and small teams — ready to use instantly.
home.lineEntTitle: Industry models · pitch materials · post-investment management
home.lineEntDesc: A pre-race lab for incubators, parks, and boutique FAs, with SLA and enterprise-governance integration.
home.revTitle: Triple revenue: subscription · cash advisory · <gold>5% equity exit</gold>.
home.revDesc: We don't rely on stories — we rely on a conservative basis: unrealized paper valuation is not booked as revenue; only legally registered equity-exit cash counts toward base-case P&L.
home.trustTitle: Five lines of defense — <blue>write the risk into the contract</blue>.
home.defense1Desc: Every conclusion traces back to the original evidence fragment (industry reports, policy documents, financials, patents).
home.defense2Desc: An independent agent argues against the main agent's output, surfacing survivorship bias and collusive errors.
home.defense3Desc: Prompts, model versions, temperature, and retrieved fragments are fully logged — reproducible for investors and regulators.
home.defense4Desc: Benchmarked against China's Interim Measures for Generative AI Services, outputs carry risk tags and explainability caveats.
home.defense5Desc: The 5% stake uses standard capital-increase / transfer / advisory equity-swap terms, with price, lock-up, and disclosure itemized.
home.quote1Text: ZhiQing PreFounder is the most serious pre-founding decision tool I've seen. It doesn't decide for you — it lays out, one by one, the counter-scenarios you'd rather not face.
home.quote2Text: Handing 12,000 Monte Carlo paths straight to the investment committee saved us at least 60% of due-diligence time.
home.quote3Text: Rather than building a pretty deck, they'd rather first tell me 'why this track shouldn't be pursued.' That's why I signed the Deep Program.
home.ctaTitle: Leave the judgment · to the data.
home.ctaDesc: Sign up to use the Standard Edition right away; after an NDA, we'll co-design your track stress test and business-model canvas.

market.title: Every number · <gold>recomputable line by line</gold>.
market.subtitle: Market sizing, financial paths, probability distributions, sensitivity — every chart comes from a Python script in the repo. The investor reproducibility pack includes all SEEDs, parameters, and intermediate data.
market.sizeTitle: First, let's get the <blue>market sizing</blue> straight.
market.sizeDesc: Intent pool: based on the State Administration for Market Regulation's 4.546M newly registered enterprises in 2024 + broad entrepreneurial intent (unregistered founders, sole proprietors upgrading, serial founders, overseas Chinese), totaling ~12.3M people.
market.tamNote: Intent pool × paid conversion × ARPU; mid ARPU = ${arpu}/yr
market.barTitle: Five-year paying users & cash-revenue path (mid scenario)
market.plTitle: Five-year P&L · triple revenue: <gold>subscription · cash · equity</gold>.
market.mcTitle: Uncertainty is <blue>not hidden</blue> — all 12K–30K paths shown.
market.npvTitle: User NPV improvement (thousand USD) · smart vs random baseline
market.equityTitle: 5% equity-portfolio annual exit cash band P10–P50–P90 · 12K paths
market.equitySub: 5-year cumulative median = ${cum}M · typical stake {stake}% · median post-money ${postMoney}M · median MOIC {moic}x
market.probSub: ≥ Tier-2 commercial success probability = {tier2}% · survival ≥ Tier-3 = {tier3}%
market.factorTitle: Factor sensitivity · marginal contribution of a +10% lift
market.sensSub: Discount rate {rate}% · startup hurdle rate · less 45% (tax + buffer) · Y0 initial investment $-{init}M
market.tornadoNote: Each factor's ±20% marginal impact on NPV (USD M). Bar length reflects impact magnitude; sign indicates the direction of deviation from base NPV.
market.heatmapNote: Values are NPV deviation from base (USD M). Green/gold is positive, deep navy is negative; the center (ARPU=0, conv=0) is the base scenario.
market.ctaTitle: Every calculation · recomputed with one command.
market.ctaDesc: SEED = 20260501 · python models/run_all.py · JSON output → read directly by the site

trackPage.title: High frequency ≠ <gold>a recommendation to enter blindly</gold>.
trackPage.subtitle: The Track Analytics Engine scores the 5 major tracks on 8 dimensions + Monte Carlo sampling (N={n}), outputting top-pick frequency, ranking robustness, and counter-scenarios. We want you to <u>see clearly why you 'want' to enter this track</u> before you decide whether to.
trackPage.interactiveTitle: Drag the dimensions you value — <blue>watch the ranking change</blue>.
trackPage.winNote: Note: a high top-pick frequency ≠ a recommendation to enter. Combine it with personal fit, capital access, exit paths, and due-diligence conclusions.
trackPage.robustTitle: Across 15,000 samples, each track's probability of <blue>different ranks</blue>.
trackPage.method: 8-dimension scoring + Gaussian sampling + weighted sum → top-pick frequency over N samples
notes: Weights can be tuned to founder preference; this model is exported with the default configuration
Gaussian parameters (mu, sigma) represent industry consensus and uncertainty
Top-pick frequency ≠ a recommendation to enter; combine it with personal fit and due diligence
trackPage.methodCta: Apply to use custom weights + your own industry data

analyzer.liveRankNote: Based on your weights (normalized) × each dimension's average score
analyzer.analyzerNote: Note: this component is a quick teaching re-rank; the formal report runs a full Monte Carlo + counter-scenarios.

plans.name: Standard Edition
plans.desc: For solo founders and small teams — see a track clearly in 10 minutes.

plans.name: Enterprise
plans.desc: A pre-race lab for incubators, parks, and boutique FAs, with SLA and enterprise-governance integration.

plans.name: Deep Program
plans.desc: Full due diligence + a legally structured equity-swap arrangement, deeply aligning platform compensation with the project's long-term valuation.

faqs.q: The biggest difference between Standard and Enterprise?
faqs.a: Standard targets individual, independent decisions; Enterprise supports multi-seat SSO, API integration, industry model libraries, and SLA — fit for institutions that need to collaborate across a team.
Entirely voluntary. The Deep Program can be 'pay-only' or 'pay + 5% equity alignment.' The equity option suits core teams that want a long-term partnership with mutual obligations.
Standard: 7-day no-questions refund; Enterprise: per contract (typically monthly refund); the Deep Program is delivered by milestone, with undelivered portions refundable by agreement.
We support Stripe (USD / EUR / GBP / SGD), corporate wire transfer, and crypto (USDT). The Deep Program can set up a dual-currency account.
All user data is stored encrypted (AES-256), with regional deployment (China / Singapore / Frankfurt). Private deployment is supported (Enterprise and above).

pricing.ctaDesc: A 15-minute plan consultation · we'll decide together

technology.title: Not low-latency market trading — <blue>research is the architecture</blue>.
technology.subtitle: ZhiQing PreFounder is fundamentally different from securities-trading architecture: the core is retrieval-augmented generation, a structured numerical engine, evaluation sets and content-safety filters, plus a full audit trail.
technology.heroCaption: Research → Retrieval → Agents → Evaluation → Delivery → Audit
technology.stackTitle: Testable, auditable, and <gold>reproducible</gold> at every layer.

layers.name: Data Layer
layers.desc: A structured industry database (public reports, financials, policy, patents, hiring trends) + isolated stores for users' private data

layers.name: Retrieval
layers.desc: Hybrid vector search + BM25 + relationship graph, with a Re-rank Agent reordering evidence fragments

layers.name: Agent Mesh
layers.desc: 12 specialized agents (industry research / competitor / policy / finance / legal / pitch / writing / Critic, etc.)

layers.name: Evaluation
layers.desc: Critic Agent counter-falsification + automated evaluation set + content-safety filtering

layers.name: Delivery
layers.desc: Business plans / feasibility reports / pitch materials / Excel data packs / interactive web visualizations

layers.name: Audit
layers.desc: Prompts / model versions / retrieved fragments / timestamps are fully logged — reproducible for investors and regulators

technology.meshTitle: 12 agents that specialize · collaborate · <gold>falsify each other</gold>.
technology.meshDesc: A single agent easily falls into survivorship bias and collusive errors. We use task specialization + Critic counter-arguments + an evaluation-layer veto to separate 'seemingly self-consistent' conclusions from genuinely reproducible ones.

agents.name: Industry Researcher
agents.role: Breaks down track structure, boundaries, and value chain

agents.name: Regulator Watcher
agents.role: Continuously tracks regulatory events and policy direction

agents.name: Interview Designer
agents.role: Due-diligence checklists and customer interview guides

agents.name: Writer
agents.role: Structured writing of business plans / feasibility reports

technology.costTitle: We lay out the <blue>unit cost</blue> for you to see.
technology.costSubtitle: Not the market price — our true marginal cost for every 60-120 page deep report, recomputable line by line.
technology.reportApi: API inference (635K tokens, 70:30 in/out blended pricing)
technology.reportNote: Note: list price ranges $25K-$45K; the gross margin funds model iteration, complex due diligence, and legal-structure costs.
technology.subNote: Unit cost is expected to drop ~35% at scale (Model 03 note: conservatively retained).
technology.ctaTitle: See our Track Analytics Engine in action.
technology.ctaDesc: 15K Monte Carlo paths, outputting top-pick frequency, ranking robustness, and a benchmark-score heatmap.

about.title:
We don't decide for you —

we make your decisions auditable.
about.subtitle: ZhiQing PreFounder is a pre-race lab built for serious founders. We combine multi-agent research, reproducible financial models, and legally structured equity-swap arrangements to nail the most important judgments before you found a company.
about.heroCaption: Research is the product · transparency is the moat
about.mission: In a world where 70% of startup failures stem from 'wrong track and model assumptions,' we make pre-founding judgment structured, quantifiable, and auditable.
about.teamTitle: 28 people, all from <blue>McKinsey · KKR · MIT · Google · Two Sigma</blue>.
about.teamNote: Planned to 125 people within 5 years · cumulative headcount cost $51.8M (Model 07)

about.govTitle: Stating the <gold>risks</gold> clearly matters more than telling a clean story.

risks.name: Tighter regulation
risks.mitigation: Multi-agent compliance filtering + policy timeline + quarterly legal audit

risks.name: AI model dependence
risks.mitigation: Multi-model routing + in-house lightweight inference + caching to lower unit cost

risks.name: Customer acquisition cost
risks.mitigation: University / incubator / FA channel profit-share + long-tail content marketing

risks.name: Data compliance
risks.mitigation: AES-256 encryption + regional deployment + SOC 2 roadmap

risks.name: 5% equity legal risk
risks.mitigation: 4 standardized term types + cross-border legal counsel + quarterly disclosure

risks.name: Hallucination & quality
risks.mitigation: Critic Agent counter-falsification + evaluation set + citation-consistency enforcement

about.disclaimerTitle: Confidential · for qualified decision-making and financing review only
disclaimer: This website and its related documents are prepared by the ZhiQing PreFounder founding team for prospective investors, strategic partners, and professional readers who have passed a suitability assessment.

Beyond software-subscription and business-plan / feasibility-study advisory fees, the '~5% stake in the target company' described herein is subject to duly executed transaction documents (capital increase, equity transfer, or advisory equity swap) and to the securities and private-financing rules of the company's place of registration; it does not constitute any public offering or securities offer to unspecified parties.

The platform focuses on pre-founding industry/track research, structured business-model reasoning, and scenario analysis; it does not provide live trading instructions for secondary-market securities or futures. The economic consequences of the equity portion are conservatively booked as 'liquidity realization' in the models, and unrealized valuation is not recognized as revenue.

All forecasts and probabilities herein derive from reproducible Python models and reasonable assumptions, and carry significant uncertainty. No conclusion should be treated as a promise of future performance or project-exit returns.
about.disclaimerStat: Typical stake {stake}% · 12,000-path Monte Carlo · SEED = 20260501 · median post-money ${postMoney}M
privacy: All user workspace data is stored encrypted with AES-256
We never sell personal information or workspace data to third parties
Export / delete all your data in Account → Privacy (aligned with GDPR / PIPL)
SOC 2 Type II certification roadmap: 2027 H1
about.termsDesc: The full Terms of Service / DPA / SCC / cross-border data-transfer clauses, plus the legally structured 5% equity standard templates.

comments.title: Comments
comments.textPlaceholder: Join the discussion · offer counter-falsifications · share your judgment
comments.empty: No comments yet — be the first.

seed.c1: 'Falsifying matters more than confirming' — that one line made me re-examine 6 months of my team's assumptions. In round two we cut 11 unverified key assumptions.
seed.c1r1: Thanks for sharing. If you're open to it, we'd be glad to run a free counter-scenario stress test for your team.
seed.c2: The control-group concept is far too underrated in the pre-startup phase. I hope to see a more detailed control-experiment methodology in the future.
seed.c3: How exactly is the 5% anti-dilution protection designed — full ratchet or weighted average? Some articles say full ratchet is too harsh.
seed.c4: Showing P10/P50/P90 next to every number by default — this UX decision is spot on.
